revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#switch:{{Namespace detect|template=t|module=m|demospace={{{demospace|<noinclude>module</noinclude>}}}}}
|t
|m = {{#switch:{{#invoke:Effective protection level|edit|1={{{demopage|{{#switch:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|doc|sandbox={{FULLBASEPAGENAME}}|#default={{FULLPAGENAME}}}}}}}}}|*|user=|#default={{ombox
| type = notice
| image = [[File:{{#switch:{{#invoke:Effective protection level|edit|1={{{demopage|{{#switch:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|doc|sandbox={{FULLBASEPAGENAME}}|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}}}}}}|autoconfirmed=Semi|extendedconfirmed=Extended|accountcreator|templateeditor=Template|sysop=Full}}-protection-shackle.svg|40x40px|link=|alt=Protected]]
| text = This {{Namespace detect|template=template|module=module|demospace={{{demospace|<noinclude>module</noinclude>}}}}} is [[:Category:Modules subject to page protection|subject to page protection]]{{#if:{{{reason|}}}|{{space}}{{{reason|}}}|. It is a [[Wikipedia:High-risk templates|highly visible {{Namespace detect|template=template|module=module|demospace={{{demospace|<noinclude>module</noinclude>}}}}}]] in use by a very large number of pages, or is [[Wikipedia:Substitution|substituted]] very frequently. Because vandalism or mistakes would affect many pages, and even trivial editing might cause substantial load on the servers, it is [[Wikipedia:Protection policy|protected]] from editing.}}
}}{{#if:{{{demopage|}}}{{{demospace|}}}||
{{#ifeq: {{ROOTPAGENAME}} | Sandbox 
     | <!-- No category for user sandboxes -->
     | {{#switch: {{SUBPAGENAME}}
         | doc | sandbox =<!-- No category for /doc or /sandbox subpages -->
         | {{#ifeq: {{{nocat|}}} | true
             | <!-- No category if user sets nocat=true --> 
             | {{Module other|module=[[Category:Modules subject to page protection|{{PAGENAME}}]]}}
           }}
       }}
    }}
}}
}}
|#default=
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Module rating/protected}}
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported from [[:wikipedia:Template:Module_rating/protected]]: Mass importing wikipedia
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#switch:{{Namespace detect|template=t|module=m|demospace={{{demospace|<noinclude>module</noinclude>}}}}}
|t
|m = {{#switch:{{#invoke:Effective protection level|edit|1={{{demopage|{{#switch:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|doc|sandbox={{FULLBASEPAGENAME}}|#default={{FULLPAGENAME}}}}}}}}}|*|user=|#default={{ombox
| type = notice
| image = [[File:{{#switch:{{#invoke:Effective protection level|edit|1={{{demopage|{{#switch:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|doc|sandbox={{FULLBASEPAGENAME}}|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}}}}}}|autoconfirmed=Semi|extendedconfirmed=Extended|accountcreator|templateeditor=Template|sysop=Full}}-protection-shackle.svg|40x40px|link=|alt=Protected]]
| text = This {{Namespace detect|template=template|module=module|demospace={{{demospace|<noinclude>module</noinclude>}}}}} is [[:Category:Modules subject to page protection|subject to page protection]]{{#if:{{{reason|}}}|{{space}}{{{reason|}}}|. It is a [[Wikipedia:High-risk templates|highly visible {{Namespace detect|template=template|module=module|demospace={{{demospace|<noinclude>module</noinclude>}}}}}]] in use by a very large number of pages, or is [[Wikipedia:Substitution|substituted]] very frequently. Because vandalism or mistakes would affect many pages, and even trivial editing might cause substantial load on the servers, it is [[Wikipedia:Protection policy|protected]] from editing.}}
}}{{#if:{{{demopage|}}}{{{demospace|}}}||
{{#ifeq: {{ROOTPAGENAME}} | Sandbox 
     | <!-- No category for user sandboxes -->
     | {{#switch: {{SUBPAGENAME}}
         | doc | sandbox =<!-- No category for /doc or /sandbox subpages -->
         | {{#ifeq: {{{nocat|}}} | true
             | <!-- No category if user sets nocat=true --> 
             | {{Module other|module=[[Category:Modules subject to page protection|{{PAGENAME}}]]}}
           }}
       }}
    }}
}}
}}
|#default=
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Module rating/protected}}
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#switch:{{Namespace detect|template=t|module=m|demospace={{{demospace|<noinclude>module</noinclude>}}}}}
|t
|m = {{#switch:{{#invoke:Effective protection level|edit|1={{{demopage|{{#switch:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|doc|sandbox={{FULLBASEPAGENAME}}|#default={{FULLPAGENAME}}}}}}}}}|*|user=|#default={{ombox
| type = notice
| image = [[File:{{#switch:{{#invoke:Effective protection level|edit|1={{{demopage|{{#switch:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|doc|sandbox={{FULLBASEPAGENAME}}|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}}}}}}|autoconfirmed=Semi|extendedconfirmed=Extended|accountcreator|templateeditor=Template|sysop=Full}}-protection-shackle.svg|40x40px|link=|alt=Protected]]
| text = This {{Namespace detect|template=template|module=module|demospace={{{demospace|<noinclude>module</noinclude>}}}}} is [[:Category:Modules subject to page protection|subject to page protection]]{{#if:{{{reason|}}}|{{space}}{{{reason|}}}|. It is a [[Wikipedia:High-risk templates|highly visible {{Namespace detect|template=template|module=module|demospace={{{demospace|<noinclude>module</noinclude>}}}}}]] in use by a very large number of pages, or is [[Wikipedia:Substitution|substituted]] very frequently. Because vandalism or mistakes would affect many pages, and even trivial editing might cause substantial load on the servers, it is [[Wikipedia:Protection policy|protected]] from editing.}}
}}{{#if:{{{demopage|}}}{{{demospace|}}}||
{{#ifeq: {{ROOTPAGENAME}} | Sandbox 
     | <!-- No category for user sandboxes -->
     | {{#switch: {{SUBPAGENAME}}
         | doc | sandbox =<!-- No category for /doc or /sandbox subpages -->
         | {{#ifeq: {{{nocat|}}} | true
             | <!-- No category if user sets nocat=true --> 
             | {{Module other|module=[[Category:Modules subject to page protection|{{PAGENAME}}]]}}
           }}
       }}
    }}
}}
}}
|#default=
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Module rating/protected}}
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>
<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#switch:{{Namespace detect|template=t|module=m|demospace={{{demospace|<noinclude>module</noinclude>}}}}}
|t
|m = {{#switch:{{#invoke:Effective protection level|edit|1={{{demopage|{{#switch:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|doc|sandbox={{FULLBASEPAGENAME}}|#default={{FULLPAGENAME}}}}}}}}}|*|user=|#default={{ombox
| type = notice
| image = [[File:{{#switch:{{#invoke:Effective protection level|edit|1={{{demopage|{{#switch:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|doc|sandbox={{FULLBASEPAGENAME}}|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}}}}}}|autoconfirmed=Semi|extendedconfirmed=Extended|accountcreator|templateeditor=Template|sysop=Full}}-protection-shackle.svg|40x40px|link=|alt=Protected]]
| text = This {{Namespace detect|template=template|module=module|demospace={{{demospace|<noinclude>module</noinclude>}}}}} is [[:Category:Modules subject to page protection|subject to page protection]]{{#if:{{{reason|}}}|{{space}}{{{reason|}}}|. It is a [[Wikipedia:High-risk templates|highly visible {{Namespace detect|template=template|module=module|demospace={{{demospace|<noinclude>module</noinclude>}}}}}]] in use by a very large number of pages, or is [[Wikipedia:Substitution|substituted]] very frequently. Because vandalism or mistakes would affect many pages, and even trivial editing might cause substantial load on the servers, it is [[Wikipedia:Protection policy|protected]] from editing.}}
}}{{#if:{{{demopage|}}}{{{demospace|}}}||
{{#ifeq: {{ROOTPAGENAME}} | Sandbox 
     | <!-- No category for user sandboxes -->
     | {{#switch: {{SUBPAGENAME}}
         | doc | sandbox =<!-- No category for /doc or /sandbox subpages -->
         | {{#ifeq: {{{nocat|}}} | true
             | <!-- No category if user sets nocat=true --> 
             | {{Module other|module=[[Category:Modules subject to page protection|{{PAGENAME}}]]}}
           }}
       }}
    }}
}}
}}
|#default=
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Module rating/protected}}
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#switch:{{Namespace detect|template=t|module=m|demospace={{{demospace|<noinclude>module</noinclude>}}}}}
|t
|m = {{#switch:{{#invoke:Effective protection level|edit|1={{{demopage|{{#switch:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|doc|sandbox={{FULLBASEPAGENAME}}|#default={{FULLPAGENAME}}}}}}}}}|*|user=|#default={{ombox
| type = notice
| image = [[File:{{#switch:{{#invoke:Effective protection level|edit|1={{{demopage|{{#switch:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|doc|sandbox={{FULLBASEPAGENAME}}|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}}}}}}|autoconfirmed=Semi|extendedconfirmed=Extended|accountcreator|templateeditor=Template|sysop=Full}}-protection-shackle.svg|40x40px|link=|alt=Protected]]
| text = This {{Namespace detect|template=template|module=module|demospace={{{demospace|<noinclude>module</noinclude>}}}}} is [[:Category:Modules subject to page protection|subject to page protection]]{{#if:{{{reason|}}}|{{space}}{{{reason|}}}|. It is a [[Wikipedia:High-risk templates|highly visible {{Namespace detect|template=template|module=module|demospace={{{demospace|<noinclude>module</noinclude>}}}}}]] in use by a very large number of pages, or is [[Wikipedia:Substitution|substituted]] very frequently. Because vandalism or mistakes would affect many pages, and even trivial editing might cause substantial load on the servers, it is [[Wikipedia:Protection policy|protected]] from editing.}}
}}{{#if:{{{demopage|}}}{{{demospace|}}}||
{{#ifeq: {{ROOTPAGENAME}} | Sandbox 
     | <!-- No category for user sandboxes -->
     | {{#switch: {{SUBPAGENAME}}
         | doc | sandbox =<!-- No category for /doc or /sandbox subpages -->
         | {{#ifeq: {{{nocat|}}} | true
             | <!-- No category if user sets nocat=true --> 
             | {{Module other|module=[[Category:Modules subject to page protection|{{PAGENAME}}]]}}
           }}
       }}
    }}
}}
}}
|#default=
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Module rating/protected}}
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>
[[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23515111839|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#switch:{{Namespace detect|template=t|module=m|demospace={{{demospace|<noinclude>module</noinclude>}}}}}
|t
|m = {{#switch:{{#invoke:Effective protection level|edit|1={{{demopage|{{#switch:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|doc|sandbox={{FULLBASEPAGENAME}}|#default={{FULLPAGENAME}}}}}}}}}|*|user=|#default={{ombox
| type = notice
| image = [[File:{{#switch:{{#invoke:Effective protection level|edit|1={{{demopage|{{#switch:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|doc|sandbox={{FULLBASEPAGENAME}}|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}}}}}}|autoconfirmed=Semi|extendedconfirmed=Extended|accountcreator|templateeditor=Template|sysop=Full}}-protection-shackle.svg|40x40px|link=|alt=Protected]]
| text = This {{Namespace detect|template=template|module=module|demospace={{{demospace|<noinclude>module</noinclude>}}}}} is [[:Category:Modules subject to page protection|subject to page protection]]{{#if:{{{reason|}}}|{{space}}{{{reason|}}}|. It is a [[Wikipedia:High-risk templates|highly visible {{Namespace detect|template=template|module=module|demospace={{{demospace|<noinclude>module</noinclude>}}}}}]] in use by a very large number of pages, or is [[Wikipedia:Substitution|substituted]] very frequently. Because vandalism or mistakes would affect many pages, and even trivial editing might cause substantial load on the servers, it is [[Wikipedia:Protection policy|protected]] from editing.}}
}}{{#if:{{{demopage|}}}{{{demospace|}}}||
{{#ifeq: {{ROOTPAGENAME}} | Sandbox 
     | <!-- No category for user sandboxes -->
     | {{#switch: {{SUBPAGENAME}}
         | doc | sandbox =<!-- No category for /doc or /sandbox subpages -->
         | {{#ifeq: {{{nocat|}}} | true
             | <!-- No category if user sets nocat=true --> 
             | {{Module other|module=}}
           }}
       }}
    }}
}}
}}
|#default=
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Module rating/protected}}
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>
<noinclude>
[[Category:Modules subject to page protection|{{PAGENAME}}]]
[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>

<includeonly>{{#switch:{{Namespace detect|template=t|module=m|demospace={{{demospace|<noinclude>module</noinclude>}}}}}
|t
|m = {{#switch:{{#invoke:Effective protection level|edit|1={{{demopage|{{#switch:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|doc|sandbox={{FULLBASEPAGENAME}}|#default={{FULLPAGENAME}}}}}}}}}|*|user=|#default={{ombox

Because vandalism or mistakes would affect many pages, and even trivial editing might cause substantial load on the servers, it is [[Wikipedia:Protection policy|protected]] from editing.}}
}}{{#if:{{{demopage|}}}{{{demospace|}}}||
{{#ifeq: {{ROOTPAGENAME}} | Sandbox 
     | <!-- No category for user sandboxes -->
     | {{#switch: {{SUBPAGENAME}}
         | doc | sandbox =<!-- No category for /doc or /sandbox subpages -->
         | {{#ifeq: {{{nocat|}}} | true

}}</includeonly><noinclude>

{{documentation}}

</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24947213578|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#switch:{{Namespace detect|template=t|module=m|demospace={{{demospace|<noinclude>module</noinclude>}}}}}
|t
|m = {{#switch:{{#invoke:Effective protection level|edit|1={{{demopage|{{#switch:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|doc|sandbox={{FULLBASEPAGENAME}}|#default={{FULLPAGENAME}}}}}}}}}|*|user=|#default={{ombox
| type = notice
| image = [[File:{{#switch:{{#invoke:Effective protection level|edit|1={{{demopage|{{#switch:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|doc|sandbox={{FULLBASEPAGENAME}}|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}}}}}}|autoconfirmed=Semi|extendedconfirmed=Extended|accountcreator|templateeditor=Template|sysop=Full}}-protection-shackle.svg|40x40px|link=|alt=Protected]]
| text = This {{Namespace detect|template=template|module=module|demospace={{{demospace|<noinclude>module</noinclude>}}}}} is [[:Category:Modules subject to page protection|subject to page protection]]{{#if:{{{reason|}}}|{{space}}{{{reason|}}}|. It is a [[Wikipedia:High-risk templates|highly visible {{Namespace detect|template=template|module=module|demospace={{{demospace|<noinclude>module</noinclude>}}}}}]] in use by a very large number of pages, or is [[Wikipedia:Substitution|substituted]] very frequently. Because vandalism or mistakes would affect many pages, and even trivial editing might cause substantial load on the servers, it is [[Wikipedia:Protection policy|protected]] from editing.}}
}}{{#if:{{{demopage|}}}{{{demospace|}}}||
{{#ifeq: {{ROOTPAGENAME}} | Sandbox 
     | 
     | {{#switch: {{SUBPAGENAME}}
         | doc | sandbox =
         | {{#ifeq: {{{nocat|}}} | true
             |  
             | {{Module other|module=}}
           }}
       }}
    }}
}}
}}
|#default=
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Module rating/protected}}
{{documentation}}

[[Category:Modules subject to page protection|{{PAGENAME}}]]
[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>
